name: Pina Al Horno Con Natillas (Baked Pineapple with Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 3 eggs (1 whole egg and 2 egg yolks)
recipeInstructions:
If desired, use 1 teaspoon rum flavoring instead of rum.
Use 1 whole egg and 2 egg yolks for the sauce mixture.
1. Lay the pineapple on its side and carefully cut a thick slice off one side, avoiding the leaves.
2. Scoop out the inside flesh and cut into bite-sized pieces.
3. Sweeten the pieces to taste with sugar.
4. Mix in the rum or rum flavoring.
5. Place the mixture back into the shell and dot with butter.
6. Wrap the pineapple, including the leaves, tightly with foil.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
8. Serve warm on a decorative platter alongside the chilled sauce.
Sauce:
1. Scald the light cream (or half-and-half) by heating until it just begins to simmer.
2. Allow it to cool slightly.
3. In a bowl, combine the salt, sugar beaten with eggs (1 whole egg and 2 yolks), cornstarch, and vanilla extract.
4. Cook over a double boiler or simmering water, stirring constantly, until smooth and slightly thickened.
5. Remove from heat and allow to cool before serving.
